purposes.description: Compute great-circle distance between two lat/lon points using the Haversine formula

primitives.evidence: Haversine formula is spherical geometry (SKILL.md:8-54), explicitly listed as L3 example in primitive definition
Multi-step trigonometric computation: degree-to-radian conversion, sin²/cos products, arcsin (SKILL.md:13-14)
TypeScript haversine implementation with basic Math methods (SKILL.md:29-39)
Python implementation importing math standard library module (SKILL.md:44-53)

purposes.description: Compute initial bearing (azimuth) between two geographic points, normalized to 0-360 degrees

primitives.evidence: Spherical bearing calculation using atan2 on lat/lon coordinates (SKILL.md:56-82)
Multi-step: radian conversion, trig operations, atan2, modulo normalization (SKILL.md:61-65, 78)

purposes.description: Compute all pairwise great-circle distances for a set of N geographic points

primitives.evidence: Repeated haversine over N×N point pairs (SKILL.md:84-101)
Nested iteration with diagonal-skip condition i !== j (SKILL.md:94)
TypeScript distanceMatrix function with array construction and nested loops (SKILL.md:88-100)

purposes.description: Find the closest geographic point to a query point from a set of candidates

primitives.evidence: Nearest-neighbor search using haversine distance over lat/lon points (SKILL.md:107-123)

purposes.description: Find the K closest geographic points to a query point, sorted by distance
